rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors for this clear header.
Consensus across all extractors for this clear section header.
Chosen from gpt-5-mini. claude-haiku incorrectly merged this line with the next and missed the amount. Visual verification confirms '16 8' in pounds/shillings columns.
Chosen from gpt-5-mini. claude-haiku missed this entry and its amount. Visual verification confirms '11' in the pounds column, with no shillings/pence.
Amounts agreed by both extractors for the inline '5.3'. Opted for description without embedded amount.
Visual verification confirms '4.8' for 4s 8d as read by claude-haiku. Gpt-5-mini misread '8' as a punctuation mark.
Visual verification confirms '12.8' for 12s 8d as read by gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku missed the pence digit. Gpt-5-mini's description is also more accurate ('Comm.' vs 'Comn.').
Amounts agreed by both extractors for the inline '5.2'. Opted for gpt-5-mini's description which separates the textual description from the extracted numeric value.
Visual verification confirms '4.2.10' unambiguously as £4 2s 10d, matching gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku's interpretation was uncertain and incorrect.
Row found and extracted only by gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms the description 'Comm.^a' and inline amount '11.19.6' as £11 19s 6d. claude-haiku missed this row.
Amounts agreed by both extractors. Gpt-5-mini's blank description is visually accurate for this subtotal line, whereas claude-haiku included a partial description not belonging to this specific line.
Chosen from gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms 'Rose posts' as the description and a clear '3' in the pounds column. Claude-haiku misidentified this as a description-only row/header.

Visual verification confirms '45' in pounds and '3' in shillings, as read by gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku initially misread 45 as shillings, violating a hard rule, and then gave a confusing 'adjusted' interpretation in its notes.
Chosen from gpt-5-mini as claude-haiku's extraction violated the hard rule (pence >= 12). Visual verification confirms '1' in pounds and '13' in shillings.
Chosen from gpt-5-mini as claude-haiku's extraction violated the hard rule (pence >= 12). Visual verification confirms 'Thatching' and '4' in pounds, '13' in shillings.
Visual verification confirms '2' in pounds and '1' in shillings, as read by gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku incorrectly read these as shillings and pence.

Visual verification confirms '2' in pounds and '6' in shillings, as read by gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku incorrectly read these as shillings and pence.

Chosen from gpt-5-mini as claude-haiku's extraction violated the hard rule (pence >= 12). Visual verification confirms '4' in pounds and '12' in shillings. Gpt-5-mini's description is also more accurate.

Chosen from gpt-5-mini. Although visually the amounts '40' and '11' appear on separate lines next to split description text, gpt-5-mini correctly interpreted these as the pounds and shillings components of a single compound entry's total amount. Claude-haiku had invalid values for its split entries.

Chosen from gpt-5-mini as claude-haiku's extraction violated the hard rule (pence >= 12) and had an incorrect description. Visual verification confirms 'Wolgrove' and '5 1 3' across pounds, shillings, and pence columns.

Visual verification confirms '4' in pounds, '9' in shillings, and '3' in pence as read by gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku incorrectly read these as shillings and pence only. Gpt-5-mini's description is also more accurate ('sig' vs 'pig').

Supervisor override by visual verification. Both extractors misread the amount. The image clearly shows 'Poles' with '16' in the shillings column. Gpt-5-mini read '10 6' and claude-haiku read '16d' (violating a hard rule).
Visual verification confirms '1' in pounds, '9' in shillings, and '6' in pence as read by gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku incorrectly read these as shillings and pence only.

Visual verification confirms '3' in pounds and '17' in shillings as read by gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku incorrectly read these as shillings and pence only. Gpt-5-mini's description is also more accurate.

Visual verification confirms '3' in pounds, '4' in shillings, and '10' in pence as read by gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku misread the column alignment and misinterpreted the pence value, as noted by its own low confidence and uncertainty.
Visual verification confirms '17' in pounds and '8' in shillings as read by gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku completely misread the amount, likely due to faint bleed-through on the page.
Visual verification confirms '17' in pounds and '9' in shillings as read by gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku completely misread the amount, likely due to faint bleed-through on the page.

Visual verification confirms '9' in pounds, '12' in shillings, and '6' in pence as read by gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku misread the pounds column and had a less accurate description.

Visual verification confirms '1' in pounds and '9' in shillings as read by gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku incorrectly read these as shillings and pence. Gpt-5-mini's description of 'Randas' is also preferred.
